channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NordLayer Summer Sale offers 20% discount across Lite, Core, and Premium plans
item.description: Grab a 20% discount on annual plans from NordLayer

item.title: Canicule : l’astuce ultime pour garder une maison propre et fraîche sans lever le petit doigt [Sponso]
item.description: Du frais et du propre à moindre coût : PcComponentes attaque les soldes d'été pied au plancher avec des promotions sur ses rayons robots aspirateurs, climatiseurs et ventilateurs.

item.title: Stop Mowing Your Grass Forever With One of These Highly Rated Robot Mowers On Sale
item.description: You don't need to cut your own grass anymore. Most of the best robot mowers I've tested are on sale for Prime Day.

item.title: The best streaming stick deals on Prime Day: Score a streaming stick for as low as $10
item.description: Shop the best streaming stick deals for Amazon Prime Day, including the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus, Google TV Streamer 4K, and more.

item.title: Sony licencie la majorité de l’équipe Destiny, quatre ans après son rachat de Bungie
item.description: Après plusieurs semaines de rumeurs, Bungie confirme un large plan de licenciements au sein du studio, seulement 4 ans après le rachat par Sony PlayStation.

item.title: Get Macbooks at a Prime Day discount before Apple’s new price hikes kick in
item.description: Apple just raised the prices on Macs and iPads in response to the rising costs of memory chips, right in the middle of Amazon Prime Day. That means existing discounts (even small ones) on Apple laptops like the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, and MacBook Pro just became significantly better deals. As an example, the 13-inch […]

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the latest Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on Samsung TVs, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: GTA VI Online release date: What we know so far
item.description: 'Grand Theft Auto VI' is almost upon us, but only the single-player portion. Will we get an online mode?

item.title: It’s a bird! It’s a plane! No, it's your shiny new DJI drone thanks to these 35% off savings
item.description: I've scoured Amazon for the best DJI drone deals this Prime Day — here are the savings still worth grabbing.

item.title: Sony A7R VI review: A huge speed boost makes this a nearly perfect high-resolution camera
item.description: Sony's A7R VI finally serves up speed and resolution together thanks to the new 67MP stacked sensor.

item.title: I ran my first half-marathon last year, and these are the Shokz headphones I wish I had invested in to power me through the killer 13-mile race
item.description: Shokz is one of our favorite running headphone brands, and Amazon is being generous with deals this Prime Day.

item.title: Is GTA 6 too expensive? We asked, and lots of you said 'Rockstar just lost a sale' — but a surprising number of people are willing to buy it anyway
item.description: We asked our audience what they thought of the GTA 6 price — and you can probably guess what they had to say...

item.title: The Bear reheats The Pitts nachos in a baffling Season 5: Review
item.description: "The Bear"'s fifth and final outing sticks a wobbly landing, with a season that takes place over the span of one day. Review.

item.title: IBM says it has created the world's first sub-1 nanometer chip
item.description: IBM says it has created the world's first sub-1 nanometer chip

item.title: Sense and Sensibility trailer has fans labelling new movie version 'unnecessary' — but I think there's a secret weapon hiding in its spectacular cast
item.description: The first trailer for the Daisy Edgar-Jones-led adaptation of Sense and Sensibility is here — and frustrated fans might be overlooking an important casting.

item.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
item.description: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

item.title: Trump admin bars Polestar from selling its new EVs in the US
item.description: The Department of Commerce declined to give the Chinese-owned automaker a special authorization to keep selling EVs in the U.S.

item.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
item.description: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro

item.title: GTA 6 est déjà 30 € moins cher : voici les meilleures offres de précommande pour le futur hit de Rockstar
item.description: Grand Theft Auto VI est sans conteste le jeu le plus attendu de la décennie, et l'attente s'apprête à devenir très concrète. Rockstar Games a officialisé la nouvelle : les précommandes sont ouvertes. Découvrez les meilleures offres pour réserver votre voyage à Vice City au meilleur prix.

item.title: Apple hikes prices for most of its hardware
item.description: Macs, MacBooks, iPads and other Apple products just got more expensive.

item.title: Bungie hit with ‘significant’ layoffs after ending Destiny 2
item.description: Now that Bungie has moved on from Destiny 2, the game studio is being hit with its latest round of layoffs. In a statement posted on X, the studio said that "we are announcing a reduction in force as we reorganize Bungie." No specific numbers were revealed. But in a separate statement, Hermen Hulst, CEO […]

item.title: I tested 5 tools for growing a plumbing business in 2026
item.description: I tested five types of software built for plumbing businesses, covering scheduling, asset tracking, AI lead capture, accounting and staff training.

item.title: The World Cup is causing a spike in Tinder activity
item.description: Tinder is seeing an increase in swipes, likes, and matches during the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Instagram, Netflix, Spotify : tous épinglés sur une liste de la honte
item.description: Instagram, Netflix, Spotify : trois géants que vous ouvrez tous les jours, désormais épinglés sur une liste de la honte. Leur tort ? Refuser encore les passkeys, cette technologie censée tuer le phishing.

item.title: Look, Bose still makes the best noise-cancelling earbuds for Android and that's final —I don't recommend AirPods without an iPhone
item.description: You'll see plenty of AirPods deals this Prime Day, but don't be tempted without an iPhone — and if you're an Android owner, I've got you

item.title: Grâce aux Soldes, vous pouvez avoir le Google Pixel 8 à seulement 249 €, en pack avec une caméra Nest
item.description: Le Google Pixel 8 est le smartphone de la marque pour l'année 2023, encore tout à fait recommandable aujourd'hui, qui se retrouve aujourd'hui dans un pack avec une Google Nest Cam à seulement 249 euros chez Carrefour.

item.title: Sure, you have an AeroPress, but is it pink? The whole rainbow is on offer for Amazon Prime Day, and you might just need another one
item.description: You might already own an AeroPress coffee maker, but if it doesn't match your shirt then it might be time to grab another...

item.title: Prime Day ends soon: We found the 85+ best deals on Apple, Sony, DJI, and Lego favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is still going. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: How autonomous systems are reshaping warehouse operations
item.description: How the increasing autonomy of robots is transforming warehouse operations.

item.title: Apple price hikes live — all the latest on Mac, iPad and HomePod price rises and which deals to grab now
item.description: Apple just announced price hikes for the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, Apple TV, HomePod mini, and more. Here's all the latest reactions, and the deals that could save the day.

item.title: Vie extraterrestre : un rover de la Nasa révèle sur Mars une brique essentielle de la vie
item.description: Il y a quelques milliards d’années, on trouvait, dans cette région de la planète Mars, une rivière qui charriait de l’eau à profusion. Et aujourd’hui, des chercheurs confirment y avoir détecté des molécules de carbone organique. Ce nouvel indice de l’habitabilité passée de la Planète rouge...

item.title: Les smartphones pliables perdent 65 % de leur valeur en 12 mois
item.description: Acheter un smartphone pliable coûte cher à l'achat, mais aussi à la revente. Selon une étude du comparateur américain SellCell, ces appareils subissent la pire décote du marché après seulement douze mois d'utilisation. Et l'iPhone Ultra ne devrait pas faire exception.

item.title: Chrome : Gemini ajoute une fonction « Entourer pour chercher » au navigateur
item.description: Comme sur Android, certains internautes peuvent désormais sélectionner une partie de la page affichée par Chrome et lancer une recherche à son sujet dans Gemini.

item.title: Windows 10 : Microsoft prolonge d’un an ses mises à jour de sécurité gratuites, jusqu’en 2027
item.description: Microsoft vient d'annoncer une prolongation d'un an des mises à jour de sécurité pour les utilisateurs de Windows 10. De quoi laisser à des millions d'utilisateurs un an de plus pour migrer vers Windows 11 ou changer de PC.

item.title: I use this small but mighty Bluetooth speaker to soundtrack my summer socializing, and it's on sale right now — and you don't need Amazon Prime
item.description: The JBL Clip 5 is a compact speaker that's perfect for outdoor gatherings, and it offers surprising audio projection for its size.

item.title: Kobo Libra Colour Sale (2026): The E-Reader Deal Worth Jumping on This Prime Day
item.description: The color e-reader that’s most worth your money this Prime Day isn't from Amazon.

item.title: Pourquoi les Britanniques financent l’électricité consommée en France
item.description: Au Royaume-Uni, les échanges d’électricité avec la France suscitent le débat. Certains dénoncent un dysfonctionnement qui pénaliserait les consommateurs britanniques, contraints de financer une petite partie d’une énergie consommée ici dans l’Hexagone.

item.title: Edge users beware — this malicious extension can break out of the sandbox and install ransomware
item.description: Hackers found a way to get an Edge extension to do their bidding.

item.title: Apple just made Macs and iPads more expensive — Prime Day might be your last chance to buy before prices catch up
item.description: Apple's new pricing is already in effect, but Prime Day is keeping MacBooks, iPads, and other Apple devices at some of their lowest prices of the year.

item.title: MacBook Air M5 : il reste des stocks à 1 099 € avant la hausse
item.description: Apple vient de faire passer le MacBook Air M5 de 1 199 à 1 399 €. Sauf que les revendeurs le proposent encore à 1 099 €, soit 300 € sous le nouveau tarif et même moins qu'à son lancement.

item.title: How banks can build a risk-intelligent approach to core modernization
item.description: As AI ambitions in banking accelerate, legacy cores create invisible risk - and banks must adapt.

item.title: Amazon profite de son Prime Day pour casser le prix du Pixel 10 Pro Fold, le smartphone pliant de Google blindé d’IA
item.description: Le Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold est le smartphone le plus cher du catalogue de la firme de Mountain View. Mais pour le Prime Day, la facture est un peu moins douloureuse puisque ce modèle pliant est proposé avec 500 euros de moins.

item.title: Samsung sort le grand jeu pour le Prime Day : voici les 7 offres à saisir avant la fin
item.description: Tic-tac… C'est la dernière ligne droite avant la fin du Prime Day ! Les appareils Samsung ne sont clairement pas épargnés par les baisses de prix. Smartphones, montres ou écouteurs, le géant coréen voit ses meilleures références bradées. Découvrez notre sélection pour ne rien rater.

item.title: 9 ways contractors can streamline processes in 2026
item.description: Practical ways contractors can cut admin time and speed up payments as competition for skilled labor tightens in 2026.

item.title: China’s Lineshine ‘came out of nowhere’ to grab title of most powerful computer in the known universe
item.description: "Intelligent splendor or brightness" uses Arm CPU only to unexpectedly surpass US rivals.

item.title: 21 Best Prime Day Beauty Deals of 2026 (We Sifted Through Hundreds to Pick Them)
item.description: It wouldn't be Amazon Prime Day without some beauty deals. Here's a roundup of all our favorites.

item.title: She dropped out of college at 18. Now her hardware-as-a-service startup is disrupting a multibillion-dollar industry
item.description: Claire Coder turned a frustrating bathroom moment into a 34 million-product empire. Imagine walking into a professional event, feeling the sudden, unmistakable onset of your period, and realizing you’re unprepared. You rush to the restroom, only to find a rusted, coin-operated metal box demanding a quarter. In 2026, who even carries a quarter?

item.title: EverQuest Legends is a powerful nostalgia machine
item.description: I wasn't surprised when I got the call that my dad was dying, even though we'd been estranged for many years. He'd suffered addiction for decades and eventually ran out of time, which also meant he ran out of time to reconcile with me. About 15 years after we stopped talking, my aunt and uncle […]

item.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
item.description: 2 days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

item.title: Trump admin proposes axing brake-pedal requirement for AVs in a boost for Tesla
item.description: The Department of Transportation wants to remove the brake-pedal requirement for vehicles "designed to be driven exclusively by automated driving systems."

item.title: How to watch The Bear season 5 online – stream the final episodes from anywhere
item.description: With Carmy leaving the restaurant to Richie and Syd, and Cicero pressing home his pledge to shut it down, here's how to watch The Bear season 5 from anywhere.

item.title: This Prime Day might be your last chance to buy this full-frame Canon camera — and it’s heavily discounted
item.description: Canon is discontinuing one of its most popular cameras — get it for a bargain price while you can!

item.title: Apple TV 4K : il reste des stocks à prix correct avant la hausse de prix
item.description: Apple vient de gonfler le prix de l'Apple TV 4K de 60 à 110 €. Sauf que chez Amazon, Boulanger et la Fnac, il reste des exemplaires à l'ancien tarif, parfois 114 € sous le prix officiel.

item.title: I Found the Best iPad Deal for Amazon Prime Day This Year (2026)
item.description: With four iPads to choose from, there’s a clear winner in terms of discounts for Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: The 55+ best Prime Day tech deals, chosen by a tech editor on a tight budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor found the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: What Stars Watch
item.description: All TechRadar stories tagged What Stars Watch

item.title: Hausse de prix chez Apple : les tarifs des Mac, iPad, HomePod et Apple TV explosent
item.description: C'est un jeudi noir pour les fans de la marque à la pomme. Face à l'explosion du prix de la mémoire vive et du stockage, et comme annoncé par Tim Cook, Apple augmente les tarifs de la quasi-totalité de son catalogue, hors iPhone (pour le moment). Découvrez la nouvelle grille.

item.title: HomePod, Apple TV : ces autres produits Apple qui voient leur prix grimper
item.description: Apple procède à une hausse de prix de la plupart de ses produits. Les accessoires pour la maison comme les HomePod et l'Apple TV en font également les frais.

item.title: Apple just delivered the worst kind of news: price hikes across many of its major products (even the Neo) — and yes, RAM prices are to blame
item.description: Apple is raising the price of most of its product lines including iPads, MacBooks and more
